body.title: Granny ESCALATE: block ticket, never spawn CC
body.result: ESCALATE → block, not CC spawn, in b0394f42. Tests updated, all 40 tests passing.
body.description:
Remove _launch_cc_instance() from inference_dispatch_fn's ESCALATE path. Replace with cc_queue.py block <id> <reason> so the ticket goes on hold for CC review. Already coded in dispatch.py and tests updated — this ticket closes that work.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py, tests/test_granny_inference_dispatch.py
**Design rules:** Granny must never spawn CC automatically (C-system-availability); no CC spawn from automated processes
**Scope boundary:** in: ESCALATE → block; tests updated. out: constraint palace nodes (separate ticket)
**Completion criteria:** (1) inference_dispatch_fn ESCALATE path calls cc_queue.py block, not _launch_cc_instance; (2) tests pass; (3) committed and pushed
